overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk metropolis at night, transitioning from a narrow neon-lit alley through an industrial corridor into wide commercial streets beneath an elevated highway. The footage features dense holographic advertisements, futuristic architecture, and wet asphalt reflecting vibrant green and pink neon signage characteristic of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk alley with dense neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a tight alleyway surrounded by glowing green and pink neon advertisements and industrial piping

entered.detail: large bright green neon sign spelling CYBER with a holographic figure
vertical white neon sign reading PIEROGI mounted on the building facade
large metal ventilation pipes running along the left wall of the alley
illuminated sign with Japanese characters indicating business hours

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk alleyway dominated by a bright green CYBER neon sign and various holographic advertisements. The camera moves forward through the confined space, passing exposed industrial piping on the left and vertical business signs on the right, with wet asphalt reflecting the vibrant neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor with fluorescent lighting

events.description: entering dark covered corridor from the neon-lit alleyway
approaching the corridor exit, natural night light becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a dimly lit concrete corridor with industrial ceiling fixtures toward a distant exit

entered.detail: rows of harsh white fluorescent tube lights mounted on the corridor ceiling
plain gray concrete walls with visible wear and industrial fixtures
large black ventilation ducts running along the right wall and ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark, enclosed industrial corridor with fluorescent tube lighting and concrete walls. The camera moves steadily forward through this utilitarian passageway, leaving the vibrant neon alley behind, and approaches a visible exit at the far end where city lights begin to appear.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide commercial street beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: exiting the corridor into an open urban street with an elevated highway overhead
black sedan drives past on the road from right to left

agents.ego_description: emerging from the corridor, turning right onto a wide sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking on the sidewalk in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway overpass spanning across the top of the frame
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows and holographic displays
large illuminated advertising screens mounted on building facades
string of traditional red spherical lanterns hanging from the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the dark corridor into a wide, open commercial street dominated by a massive elevated highway structure overhead. After turning right onto the sidewalk, the scene reveals glass commercial towers with digital billboards and red paper lanterns hanging from the overpass. A pedestrian in red walks in the opposite direction as vehicles pass on the wet asphalt below.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with holographic billboards and storefronts

events.description: slight turn to the left while following the sidewalk curve

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and large-scale digital advertisements on building walls

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on approaching from the distance down the street

entered.detail: giant digital screen displaying a monochrome portrait of a woman on the building facade
ground-level shops with bright neon signage and glass display windows
green street sign with white text reading Allen mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the commercial street, the camera passes beneath the receding overpass and approaches a large holographic billboard displaying a portrait on the left. The Allen street sign becomes visible as the camera walks past illuminated storefronts on the right, with the elevated highway structure now visible in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrower commercial street with vending machines and anime signage

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as pedestrian crosses the street ahead
crossing the street and turning left into a narrower commercial street

agents.ego_description: waiting for a pedestrian to cross, then crossing the intersection and turning left into a narrower street lined with vending machines

notable_agents.action: person crossing the street from right to left in front of the camera

entered.detail: bright green and yellow automated vending machines with holographic displays
large purple and pink illuminated billboard featuring an anime-style character
tightly packed dark buildings with various neon signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches an intersection, waits briefly for a pedestrian to cross, then crosses the road and turns left into a narrower commercial street. This new area features futuristic green vending machines on the right and a large anime-character billboard ahead, with the wide highway street now behind. The environment feels more enclosed with buildings pressing closer on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a claustrophobic neon alleyway through a sterile industrial tunnel and into a sprawling, holographic commercial district. It begins by moving through a narrow passage dominated by a bright green CYBER sign and wet asphalt, passing exposed piping and holographic ads before the environment shifts into a dark, enclosed industrial corridor with fluorescent tube lighting. As the camera reaches the end of this utilitarian passageway, the scene opens into a wide commercial street beneath a massive elevated highway adorned with red paper lanterns and digital billboards. The camera then proceeds past a large holographic portrait and the Allen street sign, moving beneath the receding overpass while vehicles glide across the reflective road. Finally, after crossing an intersection, the view turns left into a narrower street where the open highway gives way to futuristic green vending machines and a large anime billboard as the buildings press closer together.
